additionalLabels.description: Additional labels for the ingress resource

serviceName.description: Backend service name (defaults to chart fullname)

hosts.description: Hosts covered by this TLS configuration

folder.description: Grafana folder name for the dashboard

mcpConfig.description: Configuration for the Outlook MCP Server, will be mapped to environment variables

enabled.description: If disabled, server.extraEnvCM must be set to []

selfUrl.description: The URL of the MCP Server. Used for OAuth callbacks. Example: https://outlook.mcp.unique.app

mcpBackend.description: Selects the search backend. MicrosoftGraphAndUniqueApi: dual backend, KB ingestion + semantic search (default). MicrosoftGraph: direct Graph search, no ingestion.

delegatedAccessScan.description: Delegated access scanning mode. disabled: off (default). fullAccessOnly: discovers Full Access delegation via /messages. granularAccess: discovers folder-level delegation via /mailFolders, also runs verification.

delegatedAccessDiscoveryCronSchedule.description: Cron schedule for delegated access discovery. Required when delegatedAccessScan is not disabled. Default: '0 */6 * * *' (every 6 hours).

delegatedAccessVerificationCronSchedule.description: Cron schedule for delegated access verification. Required when delegatedAccessScan is granularAccess. Default: '0 */4 * * *' (every 4 hours).

delegatedAccessRecoveryCronSchedule.description: Cron schedule for recovering stuck delegated access discovery and verification jobs. Active when delegatedAccessScan is not disabled. Default: '*/30 * * * *' (every 30 minutes).

clientId.description: The client ID of the Microsoft App Registration

publicWebhookUrl.description: The public webhook URL reachable from external network for Microsoft Graph subscriptions. Optional - defaults to SELF_URL if not provided. Example: https://outlook.mcp.unique.app/webhooks

serviceAuthMode.description: Authentication mode for Unique API services: cluster_local for in-cluster, external for app key

serviceExtraHeaders.description: Extra HTTP headers for cluster_local mode (requires x-company-id, x-user-id, x-service-id)

ingestionServiceBaseUrl.description: Base URL for Unique ingestion service (cluster_local mode). Example: http://node-ingestion.namespace:8091

scopeManagementServiceBaseUrl.description: Base URL for Unique scope management service

ingestion.description: Ingestion backend configuration (applies when mcpBackend is MicrosoftGraphAndUniqueApi)

defaultMailFilters.description: Default mail filters applied when creating a new inbox configuration. Env var: INGESTION_DEFAULT_MAIL_FILTERS (JSON string)

retentionWindowInDays.description: Limits sync to emails received within the last N days (rolling forward daily)

ignoredContents.description: List of content patterns to ignore

ignoredSenders.description: List of sender addresses to ignore

liveCatchupOverlappingWindowMinutes.description: Overlapping window (minutes) for live catch-up sync runs. Office 365 eventual consistency means late-arriving messages need re-querying. Minimum: 2. Default: 3. Env var: INGESTION_LIVE_CATCHUP_OVERLAPPING_WINDOW_MINUTES

liveCatchupRecheckOverlappingWindowMinut.description: Overlapping window (minutes) for live catch-up ready-recheck runs. Minimum: 10. Default: 10. Env var: INGESTION_LIVE_CATCHUP_RECHECK_OVERLAPPING_WINDOW_MINUTES

fullSyncRecoveryCron.description: Cron schedule for stuck full-sync recovery scans. Default: '*/2 * * * *'. Env var: INGESTION_FULL_SYNC_RECOVERY_CRON

liveCatchupRecoveryCron.description: Cron schedule for stuck live catch-up recovery scans. Default: '*/5 * * * *'. Env var: INGESTION_LIVE_CATCHUP_RECOVERY_CRON

deleteInboxRecoveryCron.description: Cron schedule for stuck inbox deletion recovery scans. Default: '*/5 * * * *'. Env var: INGESTION_DELETE_INBOX_RECOVERY_CRON

auth.description: Authentication configuration for the MCP server

accessTokenExpiresInSeconds.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

refreshTokenExpiresInSeconds.description: Refresh token expiration time in seconds
